name: Structuralinvest
notes: No public information found for structuralinvest.com. Multiple searches returned unrelated companies (Structural Capital, Structure Investments, etc.). Unable to determine industry, location, or nature of business.

name: Burton Mccall
notes: Burton McCall Limited is a UK-based multi-channel sales, marketing, and distribution company for outdoor sports, DIY, garden, home gifts, and watches brands. Headquartered in Leicester, England (primary: 163 Parker Drive, Leicester LE4 0JP). Registered in England.

name: Y7 Studio
notes: Y7 Studio is a candlelit heated yoga fitness chain founded in 2013 by Sarah Larson Levey. Originated in Brooklyn/Williamsburg; headquartered in New York City. Has locations in NYC, Los Angeles, and Austin.

name: Cashbakery
notes: No public information found for Cashbakery or cashbakery.com. Searches returned unrelated cashback/fintech companies. Unable to determine nature of business or location.

name: Paleblue
notes: Pale Blue Dot is a fractional operations and finance advisory firm for emerging CPG brands, based in New York City. Services include financial planning, fundraising advisory, supply chain management.

name: Designerfund
notes: Designer Fund is a San Francisco-based early-stage VC firm investing in design-driven technology companies focused on health, sustainability, and prosperity.

name: Humbition
notes: Humbition is a New York-based early-stage operators fund investing in founder-forward technology companies. Founded by Cyrus Massoumi (Zocdoc), Slava Rubin (Indiegogo). Certified B Corp. Focuses on marketplaces, consumer, and health tech.

name: Previvor Edge
notes: All fields already populated in source record.

name: Factorialcap
notes: Factorial Capital is a Brooklyn, NY-based early-stage VC firm founded in 2022 by Matthew Hartman, backing technical founders in AI. Portfolio includes Hugging Face, Pika, Modal Labs. Closed Fund II at $25M.

name: Northwood Ventures
source: yelp.com (485 Underhill Blvd Ste 205, Syosset NY), highperformr.ai, tracxn.com
notes: Northwood Ventures LLC is a private equity and VC firm established in 1983, headquartered at 485 Underhill Blvd #205, Syosset, New York. Also has offices in FL and CT. Invests in early to mid-stage growth companies across tech, healthcare, consumer products.

name: Seek Ventures
notes: Seek Ventures is a London, UK-based VC firm founded in 2015, investing globally in technology and internet companies through growth phase. 1-10 employees.

name: Matterfamilyoffice
notes: Matter Family Office is a St. Louis, MO-based independent family office founded in 1990, providing investment management, wealth planning, and financial services. HQ at 7711 Bonhomme Ave Suite 400, Saint Louis, MO 63105. Also has offices in Denver and Dallas. 100% employee-owned.
